Author: rzioma
Content:
Just to clarify:

1) the Project ID on the submission form in https://platform.wafer.space we chose freely using 4 letters and/or numbers, correct?

2) The small QR code ID that is generated during the "Generate ID" step (and comes up as FFFFFFFF during the Precheck) we do NOT worry. It will be inserted somewhere AFTER we submit GDS through the https://platform.wafer.space, is that correct too?

Author: mithro_
Content: The precheck embeds the ID into the QR Code.
